mainWindow.header.caption: Current module
mainWindow.message.fallbackReason: Check your network connection or runtime directory.
mainWindow.message.noAudioStream: This file does not contain a convertible audio stream.
mainWindow.message.noAudioTrack: This file does not contain an extractable audio track.
mainWindow.message.noProcessableTrack: This file does not contain a processable media stream.
mainWindow.message.noSubtitleTrack: This file does not contain an extractable subtitle track.
mainWindow.message.noVideoTrack: This file does not contain an extractable video track.
mainWindow.message.outputEncoderMissing: Required format support is unavailable in the current environment, so this format cannot be exported.
mainWindow.message.outputFormatIncompati: The target format is incompatible with the current media stream. Try MP4, MKV, MOV, or another export format.
mainWindow.message.outputInvalidArgument: The current output format or parameters are invalid, so processing could not complete.
mainWindow.message.outputPathMissing: The input file is missing, or the output folder is unavailable.
mainWindow.message.outputPermissionDenie: The output file is in use, or the current directory is not writable.
mainWindow.message.outputRevealFailed: Processing finished, but the output location could not be opened. Reason: {reason}
mainWindow.message.outputRevealMultiple: Opened the folder of the last successful output and selected that file.
mainWindow.message.outputRevealSingle: Opened the output folder and selected the completed file.
mainWindow.message.processingCancelledCo: Task cancelled. {cancelledCount} unfinished files were cancelled.
mainWindow.message.processingCancelledPe: Task cancelled. Unfinished files were stopped.
mainWindow.message.processingCompletedAl: All processing is complete. {successCount} files succeeded.
mainWindow.message.processingItemGpuFall: {fileName} could not finish with GPU transcoding. It automatically fell back to CPU and is retrying once.
mainWindow.message.processingItemSucceed: {fileName} finished successfully after falling back to CPU in {duration}.
mainWindow.message.processingNoExecutabl: None of the files in the current queue match the selected processing mode, so nothing was run.
No runnable file is available in the current queue. Check the media tracks and try again.
mainWindow.message.processingStandbyReta: This run will only process {count} files in the current {workspace} workspace. The other workspace still has {standbyCount} saved files and they will not be included in this run.
mainWindow.message.processingStarted: Started processing {count} files in the current {workspace} workspace.
mainWindow.message.processingStartedAfte: Started processing {processableCount} files. Skipped {skippedCount} files in advance because they do not match the current mode.
mainWindow.message.processingUnexpectedE: An unexpected error occurred during processing.
mainWindow.message.readyForProcessing: Files are ready. You can start processing.
mainWindow.message.runtimeNotReady: The runtime is not ready, so processing cannot start. Reason: {reason}
mainWindow.message.runtimePreparationFai: Runtime preparation failed. Check your network or runtime directory.
mainWindow.message.subtitleFormatIncompa: The current subtitle track is incompatible with the target format: image subtitles cannot be converted directly to text subtitles. Try exporting as MKS to preserve the original subtitle track.
mainWindow.message.workspaceSwitchBusy: A task is running, so workspace switching is unavailable right now.
mainWindow.processingContext.graphicalSu: A bitmap subtitle track was detected and cannot be converted directly to {format} text subtitles. Export as MKS to preserve the original subtitle track instead.
mainWindow.processingContext.missingAudi: No audio stream was detected, so the file cannot be converted to {format}.
No audio track was detected, so it cannot be extracted as {format}.
mainWindow.processingContext.missingSubt: No subtitle track was detected, so it cannot be extracted as {format}.
mainWindow.processingContext.missingVide: No video track was detected, so it cannot be extracted as {format}.
mainWindow.processingContext.modeMismatc: The current file does not match the selected processing mode.
mainWindow.processingContext.preflightUn: {fileName} could not complete track preflight. Processing will still be attempted. Reason: {reason}
The media tracks in this file could not be inspected in advance.
mainWindow.processingContext.subtitleExt: Subtitle track extraction is active: MKS preserves the original subtitle encoding whenever possible and does not use the GPU.
Subtitle track extraction is active: subtitles are exported in the selected format, converting subtitle encoding when necessary, and do not use the GPU.
mainWindow.progress.detail.cpuFallbackRe: Fell back to CPU. Retrying and estimating progress...
mainWindow.progress.detail.processingNoE: Processing the current file. Total progress is not available yet.
mainWindow.progress.detail.validating: Checking media tracks and output parameters...
mainWindow.progress.detail.waitingRealti: Waiting for FFmpeg to report live progress...
mainWindow.progress.itemDetail.processin: Processing. Total progress is not available yet.
mainWindow.progress.title: Processing progress
mainWindow.queue.title: Pending queue
mainWindow.results.title: Processing results
mainWindow.settings.outputDirectory.desc: Uses the source folder when left blank. When set, outputs are written to the selected folder.
mainWindow.settings.outputDirectory.plac: Uses the source folder when left blank
mainWindow.settings.title: Processing settings
mainWindow.transcoding.fastRemux: Fast remux is active: compatible original streams are reused first, and incompatible parts fall back to compatible transcoding.
mainWindow.transcoding.fullTranscodeAudi: Full transcode is active: this run will encode audio output with the CPU.
mainWindow.transcoding.fullTranscodeVide: Full transcode is active: this run will re-encode video output with the CPU.
mainWindow.transcoding.gpuAudioFallback: GPU acceleration is enabled, but the current workflow only processes audio, so CPU audio encoding will continue.
mainWindow.transcoding.gpuDetected: Detected available {gpuName}. Hardware video encoding can be enabled for this run.
mainWindow.transcoding.gpuOutputUnsuppor: GPU acceleration is enabled, but {format} does not support hardware video encoding, so this run automatically falls back to the CPU.
mainWindow.transcoding.gpuUnavailable: No available NVIDIA, Intel, or AMD hardware video encoder was detected. The workflow will fall back to CPU transcoding automatically.
